COPY.title: Copy
COPY_TOKEN.title: Mirror Image
COPY_TOKEN.description: While you have a mirror image, the first card you play each turn gains Replay. When you take unblocked damage, all mirror images die.
FIRST_MOVE.title: First Move
FIRST_MOVE.description: Triggers only if this is the first card you play this turn.
REVERSAL.title: Reversal
REVERSAL.description:
If the enemy's intent is not a buff, swap its intent this turn with its intent next turn.{IfUpgraded:show:
Apply 1 [gold]Weak[/gold].}
COUNTER.title: Counter
COUNTER.description:
Deal damage equal to the enemy's attack intent.{IfUpgraded:show:|
End your turn.}
BLIND.title: Blind
FORESIGHT.title: Foresight
FORESIGHT.description: [gold]First Move[/gold]: gain [gold]Block[/gold] equal to the selected enemy's attack damage.
MIRROR_IMAGE.title: Mirror Image
RIPOSTE.title: Riposte
RIPOSTE.description:
Deal {Damage:diff()} damage.
If the enemy intends to attack, deal {Bonus:diff()} extra damage.
DISRUPT.title: Disrupt
OBSCURE.title: Obscure
OBSCURE.description:
Gain {Block:diff()} [gold]Block[/gold].
If no enemy intends to attack, draw 2 cards.
DETONATE.title: Detonate
DETONATE.description:
Destroy all [gold]mirror images[/gold].
For each one destroyed, deal {Damage:diff()} damage to ALL enemies.
SIPHON.title: Siphon
SIPHON.description:
Destroy all [gold]mirror images[/gold].
For each one destroyed, gain 2 [gold]Strength[/gold] and 2 [gold]Dexterity[/gold].
SILVER_LINING.title: Silver Lining
SILVER_LINING.description: {IfUpgraded:show:Gain 1 energy.|If you have a negative effect, gain 1 energy.}
ILLUSION.title: Illusion
ILLUSION.description: This turn, treat your [gold]Strength[/gold] and [gold]Dexterity[/gold] as their absolute values.
MEMORY.title: Memory
MEMORY.description: Whenever a [gold]mirror image[/gold] is destroyed, draw 2 cards and gain 1 energy.
AMBUSH.title: Ambush
ECHO.title: Echo
ECHO.description:
Gain {Block:diff()} [gold]Block[/gold].
Put a copy of this card into your discard pile, played 1 extra time.
DIM.title: Dim
CONSCRIPT.title: Conscript
HEAVY_SLASH.title: Heavy Slash
FATE_LOOM.title: Fate Loom
FATE_LOOM.description:
Gain {Block:diff()} [gold]Block[/gold].
Put a card from your discard pile on top of your draw pile.
FATE_LOOM.selectionScreenPrompt: Choose a card to put on top of your draw pile.
RESHAPE.title: Reshape
RESHAPE.description: Add "[gold]First Move[/gold]: [gold]Replay[/gold] 1" to a card in your hand.
RESHAPE.selectionScreenPrompt: Choose a card to enchant with First Move: Replay 1.
FLICKER.title: Flicker
KALEIDOSCOPE.title: Kaleidoscope
KALEIDOSCOPE.description: Every 5 cards you play, [gold]Copy[/gold] 1 and deal 6 damage to ALL enemies.
DAZE.title: Daze
DAZE.description:
Draw 2 cards.
[gold]First Move[/gold]: draw 1 extra card.
LAST_STAND.title: Last Stand
LAST_STAND.description:
Gain {Block:diff()} [gold]Block[/gold].
If you have no [gold]mirror images[/gold], gain {ExtraBlock:diff()} extra [gold]Block[/gold].
PHASE_SHIFT.title: Phase Shift
PHASE_SHIFT.description: The next time you would take unblocked damage, your [gold]mirror images[/gold] are not destroyed.
DISILLUSION.title: Disillusion
DISILLUSION.description: Choose up to 2 cards in your hand and Exhaust them.
DISILLUSION.selectionScreenPrompt: Choose up to 2 cards to Exhaust.
DAZZLE.title: Dazzle
DAZZLE.description: At the start of each turn, gain [gold]Block[/gold] equal to your current number of [gold]mirror images[/gold].
UNVEIL.title: Unveil
SIEGE.title: Siege
SIEGE.description: Deal {Damage:diff()} damage to ALL enemies for each [gold]mirror image[/gold] you have.
CRESCENDO.title: Crescendo
CRESCENDO.description:
Lose 4 [gold]Strength[/gold].
At the start of each turn, gain 1 [gold]Strength[/gold].
PHANTASM_STORM.title: Phantasm Storm
SABOTAGE.title: Sabotage
SABOTAGE.description:
Deal {Damage:diff()} damage.
Apply {WeakPower:diff()} [gold]Weak[/gold].
[gold]First Move[/gold]: put this card on top of your draw pile.
AGING.title: Catalyze
AGING.description:
Enemy loses {HpLoss:diff()} HP.
If its intent this turn is only Attack and/or Defend, advance it to next turn's intent, discarding the current one.
